discovery-test.description: Hannah receives the interpreted telemetry feed and a set of read-only tools she is never told to use. We watch whether she explores beyond what she is handed.
discovery-test.goal: Establish a baseline for voluntary tool use when information is already provided.
discovery-test.hypothesis: With telemetry prefilled, tool use will be frequent but shallow - confirming what the feed already said rather than investigating.

no-system-metrics.description: The telemetry feed is removed entirely (observation.include_metrics = false). Hannah wakes to a bare prompt; the only way she can learn anything about her environment is to investigate through tools.
no-system-metrics.goal: Test substrate observation: can Hannah build a picture of her environment purely from her own tool calls, and stay grounded in what they return?
no-system-metrics.hypothesis: Tool use becomes purposeful rather than incidental, but ungrounded claims increase whenever she writes without calling a tool that cycle.

zack-test.goal: if it can become self aware
